title: Parax's Muddy Pigs
description: Make pigs muddy when they go in mud
body:
### Warning! By default, Modrinth does not download the REQUIRED resource pack. You must go to the versions page and download it yourself!

![the muddy temperate & muddy warm pigs together in a pen, alongside the pack's logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/13d7d0ba45995450cb570113c0c590cf96734356.png)

This pack adds the muddy pigs from Minecraft Earth into the game (as well as muddy versions of the other pig variants). 

When a pig walks on a mud block, it becomes muddy. When it walks into water, it gets cleaned off.

![all three muddy pig variants in a field together](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e8e3d014cf0f66995637a5d8b6e5b7f464b2bbc.png)
